secondary_signals.title: Empire East sees more resilient housing market
secondary_signals.summary: Empire East Land Holdings Inc., a listed property company chaired by tycoon Andrew Tan, expects a more resilient Philippine housing market, with genuine homebuyers driving demand rather than speculative investors.
